prestazioni: Engine: 4B11T (MIVEC Turbo) with forged internals including Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons for 30psi boost capability, paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe with Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors, Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger with Walbro 450LPH pumps, and a Syvecs S8 ECU with custom Ralliart-spec anti-lag and launch control maps, integrated with a Motec PDM15 for power distribution and logging

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.11 final drive ratio) with billet differential case, reinforced driveshafts by Driveshaft Shop (3.5" aluminum), and a Tilton 7.25" twin-disc carbon clutch with billet flywheel (10.5kg) for 600+ lb-ft torque capacity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (ASX-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom Ralliart-branded aluminum hood (vented for intercooler airflow) and carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping) with custom Ralliart spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and spherical bearing top mounts, complemented by Cusco front strut tower bar and rear subframe brace for chassis rigidity

Exterior: 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with Ralliart decal kit (red/white/black), Enkei PF09 wheels (18x9.5 +35 offset) in matte black with Toyo R888R tires (255/40/18), and a custom Ralliart rear wing (carbon fiber, 3-position adjustable) mounted on Cusco aluminum pedestals
